description: This video demonstrates how to transfer SOL using both client-side and on-chain methods, including CPI and program transfers. It covers the setup of key pairs, the use of system program transfer functions, and the differences between invoking CPI and directly modifying Lamport balances.
topic_summary: Transfer SOL using client-side and on-chain methods, including CPI and program transfers [t=0:24 - t=2:40].
